hero.title: Clean energy for sustainable future
hero.subtitle: We work on developing and implementing clean energy solutions in Tajikistan. Join us to make living conditions better.

features.title: Our activities
features.solar_desc: Development and installation of solar power systems for homes, businesses and government institutions

features.programming_desc: We provide innovative digital solutions for complex economic and social problems
features.innovation_desc: Development and implementation of advanced technologies for sustainable country development
